text_block_list.name: Super Creek
choice_data_list: Creek, you don't look so good...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I didn't mean to make you worry. I'm fine. It's
nothing, really.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I just feel like I've been getting tired more easily
lately...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's not your fault though! I've probably just
been pushing myself a tad too hard.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Super Creek is smiling, something is
very clearly wrong. I should make some
adjustments to her race schedule.
